meaning: n.乘务员(服务员)的职位,工作
examples: The organization certainly prospered under his stewardship.
The TMT will pay an additional $1 million annually to lease the land on which it resides, with 80 percent of those funds going to stewardship of the mountain.
This is what is meant by stewardship and accountability.
Each person who received stock also accepted an ownership stewardship in addition to their daily responsibilities.
Profits evidence efficient stewardship of capital in ways which satisfy the market and generate wealth.
